spec.name: A Small Path In The Dense Forest
spec.description: You are on a small path leading through the dense forest. To the west you see a dark cave entrance, leading into a small hillside. The path continues north and east.

north.description: The small path leads north through the trees.

east.description: The small path leads east through the trees.

extra_descs.description: The narrow path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The crowns of the old trees leave the forest in an unreal twilight illumination.
The irregular opening is eight feet wide and six feet tall. An acrid smell emanates from within.
